_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Use feedback results (e.g., lesson learned) to identify opportunities to improve collection management efficiency and effectiveness.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct program retrospectives and lessons learned documentation, producing findings that inform program management practice improvement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.382), LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.350).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.2/10 (raw 0.715). Shared vocabulary: [learned, management]. DCWF-only terms [collection, effectiveness, efficiency, feedback, identify, improve] vs WIDAI-only terms [conduct, documentation, findings, improvement, inform, lessons] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.890, R=0.893). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (89.5%). The model interprets "Use feedback results (e.g., lesson learned) to identify opportunities to improve" as logically implying aspects of "Conduct program retrospectives and lessons learned documentation, producing find" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.468 < STS 0.715 (gap -0.247). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [collection, effectiveness, efficiency] and [conduct, documentation, findings] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [learned, management]. DCWF-only: [collection, effectiveness, efficiency, feedback, identify, improve]. WIDAI-only: [conduct, documentation, findings, improvement, inform, lessons].
